query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' AND s3CoverUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND coverImageUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cover_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl = 'not-found' OR coverImageUrl IS NULL OR coverImageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as broken_covers
FROM book_profiles;
command:

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' AND s3CoverUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND coverImageUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cover_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl = 'not-found' OR coverImageUrl IS NULL OR coverImageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as broken_covers
FROM book_profiles;
